name: Dragonmaid Cehrmba
name_jp: ドラゴンメイド・シュテルン
desc: Dragon Fusion Monsters you control cannot be destroyed by your opponent's card effects. You can only use each of the following effects of "Dragonmaid Cehrmba" once per turn. You can discard this card; Special Summon 1 "Dragonmaid" monster from your GY or banishment, except "Dragonmaid Cehrmba". At the end of the Battle Phase: You can return this card to the hand, and if you do, Special Summon 1 Level 4 or lower "Dragonmaid" monster from your hand.
mnst_eff: Dragon Fusion Monsters you control cannot be destroyed by your opponent's card effects. You can only use each of the following effects of "Dragonmaid Cehrmba" once per turn. You can discard this card; Special Summon 1 "Dragonmaid" monster from your GY or banishment, except "Dragonmaid Cehrmba". At the end of the Battle Phase: You can return this card to the hand, and if you do, Special Summon 1 Level 4 or lower "Dragonmaid" monster from your hand.
eff: Dragon Fusion Monsters you control cannot be destroyed by your opponent's card effects. You can only use each of the following effects of "Dragonmaid Cehrmba" once per turn. You can discard this card; Special Summon 1 "Dragonmaid" monster from your GY or banishment, except "Dragonmaid Cehrmba". At the end of the Battle Phase: You can return this card to the hand, and if you do, Special Summon 1 Level 4 or lower "Dragonmaid" monster from your hand.

action: Returns itself from field to hand
mst: Prevents other cards being destroyed by card effects
summoning: Special Summons the player's banished monsters
misc: At the end of the Battle Phase
